{{CargoRelic
|name=Neapolitan Fisherboy
|class_id=22433
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|birthday=01-30
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On Jan 30, 1833 AD, "Neapolitan Fisherboy" made its debut at the Paris Art Exhibition.<br>Neapolitan Fisherboy is the masterpiece of French sculptor Fran?ois. This statue uses a pyramid composition that easily represents peace and stability but also portrays a lively and dynamic image of the boy. The appearance of this statue symbolizes the transformation of Western sculpture from classicism to romanticism and has important historical significance.
|fame=21
|art=46
|fth=29
|civ=33
|tech=25
|ss1=Like Super Evolution, obtained B-Tadpoles +5%
|ss2=Like Super Evolution, obtained B-Tadpoles +10%
|ss3=Like Super Evolution, obtained B-Tadpoles +15%
|ss4=Like Super Evolution, obtained B-Tadpoles +25%
|ss7=Like Super Evolution, obtained B-Tadpoles +25%<br>Like Super Evolution, obtained B-Tadpoles +25% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Forestsanctum skill I.png|50px]]Place in Forest Sanctum: Forest Sanctum, Glorium Output +5%
}}
